name: VPC
description: Amazon Virtual Private Cloud with subnets, NAT, and routing

inputs.name: name
inputs.label: VPC Name
inputs.description: Name tag for VPC and related resources

inputs.name: cidr
inputs.label: CIDR Block
inputs.description: IPv4 CIDR block for the VPC

inputs.name: azs
inputs.label: Availability Zones
inputs.description: Comma-separated list of availability zones

inputs.name: public_subnets
inputs.label: Public Subnets
inputs.description: Comma-separated public subnet CIDR blocks

inputs.name: private_subnets
inputs.label: Private Subnets
inputs.description: Comma-separated private subnet CIDR blocks

inputs.name: enable_nat_gateway
inputs.label: NAT Gateway
inputs.description: Enable NAT Gateway for private subnet internet access

inputs.name: single_nat_gateway
inputs.label: Single NAT Gateway
inputs.description: Use a single NAT Gateway for all AZs (cost-saving)

inputs.name: enable_dns_hostnames
inputs.label: DNS Hostnames
inputs.description: Enable DNS hostnames in the VPC

inputs.name: enable_dns_support
inputs.label: DNS Support
inputs.description: Enable DNS support in the VPC

inputs.name: database_subnets
inputs.label: Database Subnets
inputs.description: Comma-separated database subnet CIDR blocks

inputs.name: create_database_subnet_group
inputs.label: Create DB Subnet Group
inputs.description: Create a database subnet group from database subnets

inputs.name: elasticache_subnets
inputs.label: ElastiCache Subnets
inputs.description: Comma-separated ElastiCache subnet CIDR blocks

inputs.name: intra_subnets
inputs.label: Intra Subnets (No Internet)
inputs.description: Comma-separated intra subnet CIDRs (no internet access)

inputs.name: one_nat_gateway_per_az
inputs.label: NAT per AZ
inputs.description: Deploy one NAT Gateway per AZ (high availability, higher cost)

inputs.name: map_public_ip_on_launch
inputs.label: Auto-assign Public IP
inputs.description: Auto-assign public IP to instances in public subnets

inputs.name: enable_ipv6
inputs.label: Enable IPv6
inputs.description: Request an Amazon-provided IPv6 CIDR block

inputs.name: enable_vpn_gateway
inputs.label: VPN Gateway
inputs.description: Create a VPN Gateway for the VPC

inputs.name: enable_dhcp_options
inputs.label: DHCP Options
inputs.description: Custom DHCP options set (domain name, DNS servers)

inputs.name: dhcp_options_domain_name
inputs.label: DHCP Domain Name
inputs.description: DNS domain name for DHCP options

inputs.name: enable_flow_log
inputs.label: VPC Flow Logs
inputs.description: Enable VPC Flow Logs for network monitoring

inputs.name: instance_tenancy
inputs.label: Instance Tenancy
inputs.description: Tenancy option for instances launched in the VPC

inputs.name: secondary_cidr_blocks
inputs.label: Secondary CIDR Blocks
inputs.description: Comma-separated additional CIDR blocks

inputs.name: public_dedicated_network_acl
inputs.label: Public Dedicated NACL
inputs.description: Use dedicated network ACL for public subnets

inputs.name: private_dedicated_network_acl
inputs.label: Private Dedicated NACL
inputs.description: Use dedicated network ACL for private subnets
